name: audit log: writers append (never truncate); existing lines are preserved across runs
command: echo '{"timestamp":"2026-01-01T00:00:00Z","actor":"prior","event":"seed"}' > .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-audit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl" >/dev/null 2>&1 && head -1 .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl | grep -E '"actor":"prior"' 1>&2 && [ "$(wc -l < .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl)" -ge 2 ] && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p tree .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'source:
  id: x
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://e.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules: []
' > tree/a.yaml
